data.title: Xia Ming Kezhan
data.synopsis:
Performing operas? Gaining points through food? The modern lifestyle of martial arts practitioners is surprisingly interesting!

What would it be like if a chivalrous person lived in modern times, possessing martial arts skills not to surpass others, but to protect the weak?

Young heroes gather at the inn, embarking on a hilarious and exciting modern daily life, competing in food, honing their martial arts skills, and upholding justice amidst the chaos!

(Source: Douban, translated)

titles.title: The Popstar Water Deer and I

data.title: Golani Aidolgwa Na
data.title_english: The Popstar Water Deer and I

data.title: Jian Lai
data.synopsis:
The world is vast and full of wonders. In the mystical realm of Lizhu Cave, a destitute youth destined for greatness finds his fate upended when his life-bound porcelain shatters. Though fortune beckons, it remains tantalizingly out of reach. As a result, powerful figures begin weaving intricate schemes around him, turning the boy into the linchpin of their designs. While those around him reap extraordinary opportunities, the youth himself is left standing alone at the eye of the storm...

(Source: WeTV)
data.background: Adaptation of Fenghuo Xi Zhuhou's (烽火戏诸侯) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Terminator 0
data.synopsis:
Decades after the sentient artificial intelligence Skynet took control of the planet in 2022, the resistance is still fighting against the machines. Following a fierce battle, Eiko, a guerilla soldier in Japan, manages to corner a Terminator—Skynet's elite killing cyborg. Eiko extracts crucial details of its plan, allowing the resistance to send her back in time and secure a different future.

In August 1997, days before Skynet's looming nuclear attack known as Judgment Day, Malcolm Lee works on launching Kokoro, a new AI model designed to fight for humanity. As Judgement Day approaches, a Terminator arrives in Japan to hunt Malcolm and his children before Kokoro becomes self-aware. Malcolm must prevent his creation from getting misaligned and coming to the same conclusion as Skynet: the extinction of humans.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Although Terminator 0 shares the same universe as the Terminator live-action movies, it features a new story with different characters. It is the first animation of the Terminator franchise and premiered exclusively on Netflix.

titles.title: ニワトリ・ファイター

data.title: Niwatori Fighter
data.title_japanese: ニワトリ・ファイター
data.synopsis:
The neighborhood cock of the walk is more than just an ordinary rooster—he's humanity's greatest defender! His opponents may be ten stories tall, but nothing is bigger than his stout heart and his fearsome battle cry—cock-a-doodle-doo!

(Source: VIZ Media)
data.background: Niwatori Fighter aired in advance on March 15, 2026, on Cartoon Network's Toonami block. Regular broadcasting began on April 6, 2026.
